UNITS · SUPERVISED OS PROCESSES — UNIFORM MANIFESTS, LIVELINESS TOKEN = UP
propose: commit → plan → pending plan for the owner
propose: commit → plan → pending plan for the owner
One small Rust core supervises plain OS processes that meet on a Zenoh bus; the house repo is the single source of truth, everything else is derived or live.
